title: NeoReefRedux
description: Improves coral reef world generation by replacing flat vanilla reefs with natural rocky coral formations.
body:
# Reef Redux (NeoForge 1.21.1 Port)

This mod improves coral reef world generation by replacing the flat vanilla reefs with natural rocky formations.

Instead of coral growing directly from a flat seabed, reefs generate on rocky outcrops that create more varied and natural-looking underwater terrain.

## Features

- **Rocky coral reefs**
  Coral now generates on stone formations instead of flat ocean floors.

- **Natural shapes**
  Reefs can include caves, arches, and uneven terrain.

- **Vanilla coral support**
  Vanilla coral types still generate normally on the new reef structures.

- **Config option**
  `disableVanillaCorals` (default: false)  
  Allows disabling vanilla coral reef generation.

## Port Information

This is an updated port of **Reef Redux** for **Minecraft 1.21.1 on NeoForge**.

Original mod by **codyhuh**:  
https://modrinth.com/mod/reef-redux
